_comment: Tapis v3 LINUX storage system definition template for register-by-reference mode.
Replace every <PLACEHOLDER> with the actual value for your environment.
Submit via: tapis systems create -F tapis-system-definition.template.json
Required fields are marked REQUIRED; optional fields may be omitted.
After creating the system, grant Files READ permission to the user whose
JWT will be used for postit minting:
_comment_id: REQUIRED. Unique system identifier within your tenant, e.g. 'corral-gam'.
description: Corral GAM collection storage system for TWDB GAM CKAN register-by-reference registration.
_comment_systemType: REQUIRED. Must be LINUX for Corral/TACC storage.
_comment_host: REQUIRED. Hostname or IP of the Corral storage node, e.g. 'data.tacc.utexas.edu'. Ask your TACC admin.
_comment_rootDir: REQUIRED. Absolute path on the storage host that becomes the Tapis filesystem root. All Tapis file paths are relative to this. Must match TAPIS_SYSTEM_ROOTDIR in your .env.
_comment_defaultAuthnMethod: REQUIRED. Authentication method for the storage host. Typically PASSWORD or PKI_KEYS.
_comment_effectiveUserId: REQUIRED. The OS user on the storage host under which Tapis will read files. Usually your TACC username.

authnCredential._comment: Provide credentials matching defaultAuthnMethod. Remove fields that do not apply.

_comment_port: OPTIONAL. Default SSH port. Change if the storage host uses a non-standard port.
_comment_useProxy: OPTIONAL. Set true if the storage host requires a proxy jump.
_comment_canExec: Set false for a storage-only system (no job execution).

notes.rootDirNote: Set TAPIS_SYSTEM_ROOTDIR in your .env to match rootDir above.
notes.postit_note: Used by tapis_links.mint_postit_url to generate redeemable download URLs for CKAN url-type resources.
